title: Space Above Replacement — Lionel Messi (Argentina)
description: Lionel Messi's off-ball controllable footprint each frame (bright), drawn over the flat positional replacement baseline (translucent). The excess is the space they win beyond a replacement-level player in the same zone. Sampled SAR = +51 m^2.
units: m^2 (footprint normalized 0..1 of window max for display)
baseline_note: Replacement zone-baseline (m^2), normalized to its own max for the contour.
